'''gachaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicknackery|nicknackery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicknackery|nicknackery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gachaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæchæhæth|gæchæhæth]] || [[word:gæchæhæj|gæchæhæj]] || [[word:gæchæhæsh|gæchæhæsh]] || [[word:gæchæhæ|gæchæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gachachahath|gachachahath]] || [[word:gachachahaj|gachachahaj]] || [[word:gachachahash|gachachahash]] || [[word:gachachaha|gachachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gachahath|gachahath]] || [[word:gachahaj|gachahaj]] || [[word:gachahash|gachahash]] || [[word:gachaha|gachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gachafhath|gachafhath]] || [[word:gachafhaj|gachafhaj]] || [[word:gachafhash|gachafhash]] || [[word:gachafhaf|gachafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gachahatha|gachahatha]] || [[word:gachahaja|gachahaja]] || [[word:gachahasha|gachahasha]] || [[word:gachahaka|gachahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gachahath|gachahath]] || [[word:gachahaj|gachahaj]] || [[word:gachahash|gachahash]] || [[word:gachaha|gachaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gachahathal|gachahathal]] || [[word:gachahajal|gachahajal]] || [[word:gachahashal|gachahashal]] || [[word:gachahakal|gachahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gachahathatha|gachahathatha]] || [[word:gachahajaja|gachahajaja]] || [[word:gachahashasha|gachahashasha]] || [[word:gachahaka|gachahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gachahathan|gachahathan]] || [[word:gachahajan|gachahajan]] || [[word:gachahashan|gachahashan]] || [[word:gachahakan|gachahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gachahathaoro|gachahathaoro]] || [[word:gachahajaoro|gachahajaoro]] || [[word:gachahashaoro|gachahashaoro]] || [[word:gachahakaoro|gachahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
